articles.author: Anthony D'Alessandro, Tom Tapp
articles.title: James Gray’s ‘Paper Tiger’ Roars In Cannes World Premiere With 10-Minute Standing Ovation - Deadline
articles.description: The movie starring Scarlett Johansson, Adam Driver and Miles Teller follows two brothers who pursue the American Dream but get caught in a dangerous scheme
articles.content:
James Gray’s sixth film at the Cannes Film Festival, Paper Tiger, drew a ten-minute standing ovation tonight in its world premiere at the Grand Theatre Lumiere.
Among those leading the applause were… [+2020 chars]

articles.title: France says cruise ship Andes virus matches known South American viruses - AP News
articles.description: France’s Pasteur Institute has fully sequenced the Andes virus found in a French passenger from the MV Hondius cruise ship. They discovered it matches viruses already known in South America. Health Minister Stéphanie Rist said Friday on X that there's no evid…
articles.content: PARIS (AP) Frances Pasteur Institute said it has fully sequenced the Andes virus detected in a French passenger from the MV Hondius cruise ship and found that it matched viruses already known in Sout… [+1660 chars]
